mapper.update: update batch.job_instance set instance_status = #{instanceStatus}, success_partition_count = #{successPartitionCount}, failed_partition_count = #{failedPartitionCount}, result_summary = #{resultSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, failure_class = #{failureClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = version + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.select: select ji.* from batch.job_instance ji join batch.job_definition jd on jd.id = ji.job_definition_id and jd.tenant_id = ji.tenant_id where ji.instance_status = 'RUNNING' and ji.started_at is not null and jd.timeout_seconds > 0 and ji.started_at < current_timestamp - (jd.timeout_seconds * interval '1 second') order by ji.started_at asc, ji.id asc limit #{limit}

select ji.* from batch.job_instance ji join batch.trigger_request tr on tr.id = ji.trigger_request_id and tr.tenant_id = ji.tenant_id join batch.job_definition jd on jd.id = ji.job_definition_id and jd.tenant_id = ji.tenant_id where ji.instance_status = 'CREATED' and tr.request_status = 'ACCEPTED' and ji.created_at < #{olderThan} and coalesce(jd.job_type, '') <> 'WORKFLOW' and not exists ( select 1 from batch.job_partition jp where jp.job_instance_id = ji.id ) and not exists ( select 1 from batch.job_task jt where jt.job_instance_id = ji.id ) and not exists ( select 1 from batch.workflow_run wr where wr.related_job_instance_id = ji.id ) order by ji.id asc limit #{limit}

select * from batch.job_instance where instance_status in ('WAITING', 'READY', 'RUNNING') and sla_alerted_at is null and ( (deadline_at is not null and deadline_at < current_timestamp) or ( expected_duration_seconds > 0 and started_at is not null and started_at < current_timestamp - (expected_duration_seconds * interval '1 second') ) ) order by tenant_id asc, coalesce( deadline_at, started_at + (expected_duration_seconds * interval '1 second'), created_at ) asc, id asc limit #{limit}

select count(1) from batch.job_instance where instance_status in ('WAITING', 'READY', 'RUNNING') and sla_alerted_at is null and ( (deadline_at is not null and deadline_at < current_timestamp) or ( expected_duration_seconds > 0 and started_at is not null and started_at < current_timestamp - (expected_duration_seconds * interval '1 second') ) )

select * from batch.job_instance where instance_status in ('WAITING', 'READY', 'RUNNING') and sla_alerted_at is not null and sla_alerted_at < #{escalationBefore} order by tenant_id asc, sla_alerted_at asc, id asc limit #{limit}
select count(1) from batch.job_instance where instance_status in ('WAITING', 'READY', 'RUNNING') and sla_alerted_at is not null and sla_alerted_at < #{escalationBefore}
select count(1) from batch.job_instance where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and instance_status in ('READY', 'RUNNING')

select count(1) from batch.job_instance ji where ji.instance_status in ('READY', 'RUNNING') and ji.tenant_id in ( select tenant_id from batch.tenant_quota_policy where enabled = true and fair_share_group = #{fairShareGroup} )
select count(1) from batch.job_instance where instance_status in ('READY', 'RUNNING')

select count(distinct ji.id) from batch.job_instance ji where ji.instance_status in ('SUCCESS', 'FAILED', 'PARTIAL_FAILED', 'CANCELLED', 'TERMINATED') and ( exists ( select 1 from batch.job_partition p where p.tenant_id = ji.tenant_id and p.job_instance_id = ji.id and p.partition_status in ('CREATED', 'WAITING', 'READY', 'RUNNING', 'RETRYING') ) or exists ( select 1 from batch.job_task t where t.tenant_id = ji.tenant_id and t.job_instance_id = ji.id and t.task_status in ('CREATED', 'READY', 'RUNNING') ) )
select * from batch.job_instance where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and job_definition_id = #{jobDefinitionId} and instance_status = 'SUCCESS' order by finished_at desc nulls last, id desc limit 1
mapper.update: update batch.job_instance set high_water_mark_out = #{highWaterMarkOut}, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and #{highWaterMarkOut} ~ '^-?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$' and ( high_water_mark_out is null or high_water_mark_out = '' or high_water_mark_out !~ '^-?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$' or (high_water_mark_out)::numeric < (#{highWaterMarkOut})::numeric )
